cmake -G "Visual Studio 10" -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=c:\users\admini~1\appdata\local\temp\OpenSceneGraph-2.8.5-VS10.0.30319-x86-debug-12493 -DGNUPLOT_EXECUTABLE="C:\Program Files (x86)\gnuplot\binary\gnuplot.exe" -DBUILD_DOCUMENTATION=ON -DBUILD_OSG_EXAMPLES=ON -DADDITIONAL_MAKE_CLEAN_FILES=bin -DADDITIONAL_MAKE_CLEAN_FILES=lib  -DBUILD_OSG_WRAPPERS=ON -DCMAKE_INCLUDE_PATH=D:\OSG\28x_vs10_x86_debug\output\include -DCURL_LIBRARY=D:\OSG\28x_vs10_x86_debug\output\lib\debug_VS10.0.30319_x86\curllib.lib -DJPEG_LIBRARY=D:\OSG\28x_vs10_x86_debug\output\lib\debug_VS10.0.30319_x86\libjpegD.lib -DPNG_LIBRARY=D:\OSG\28x_vs10_x86_debug\output\lib\debug_VS10.0.30319_x86\libpng13d.lib -DTIFF_LIBRARY=D:\OSG\28x_vs10_x86_debug\output\lib\debug_VS10.0.30319_x86\libtiffD.lib -DZLIB_LIBRARY=D:\OSG\28x_vs10_x86_debug\output\lib\debug_VS10.0.30319_x86\zlib1d.lib -DGLUT_LIBRARY=D:\OSG\28x_vs10_x86_debug\output\lib\debug_VS10.0.30319_x86\glut32D.lib -DFREETYPE_LIBRARY=D:\OSG\28x_vs10_x86_debug\output\lib\debug_VS10.0.30319_x86\freetype237.lib -DGIFLIB_LIBRARY=D:\OSG\28x_vs10_x86_debug\output\lib\debug_VS10.0.30319_x86\giflib.lib
